name: Parish Church
unlockCondition: 10,000,000 ducats, Church approval, local community support
calculationsAnalysis: The Parish Church's economic values reflect its dual spiritual and community roles. The high construction cost (7,500,000 ducats) represents the significant architectural investment and decorative elements required for religious buildings in Venice. The income of 45,000 ducats (0.6% return) represents donations, fees for services, and endowments, while the maintenance cost of 40,000 ducats creates a small but sustainable profit margin. This encourages players to build churches for their substantial reputation and community benefits while providing modest financial returns, mirroring the historical importance of parish churches as neighborhood centers.
shortDescription: Neighborhood worship center serving the spiritual needs of local residents.
fullDescription: The spiritual heart of each Venetian neighborhood, parish churches provide religious services, community gathering spaces, and social support. Featuring a main worship area, bell tower, side chapels, and often charitable facilities, these buildings serve as both religious centers and neighborhood focal points. Venice's distinctive layout resulted in an unusually high number of parish churches, each forming the center of a local community.
flavorText: The parish church marks both the geographical center of the neighborhood and the spiritual center of its people's lives—from baptism to burial, all significant moments pass through these doors.

locationRequirements.districtRestrictions: Central location in neighborhood, often facing campo
locationRequirements.environmentalEffects: Creates community focal point, bell sounds at regular intervals

constructionPhase3DPrompt: Renaissance Venetian parish church under construction, religious building becoming neighborhood centerpiece, stone foundation with detailed masonry work in progress, walls rising with brick and stone, wooden scaffolding surrounding structure, bell tower partially completed, craftsmen installing stained glass windows, marble columns being positioned, roof trusses visible awaiting tiles, side chapels taking shape, workmen consulting architectural plans, stone carvers creating decorative elements, building materials blessed before installation, temporary altar for continued worship during construction, community involvement in building process, isometric game perspective, stylized but detailed, blend of religious significance and community investment in construction
completedBuilding3DPrompt: Completed Renaissance Venetian parish church, neighborhood religious center featuring Venetian Gothic facade with rose window, elegant bell tower (campanile) with regular bells marking time, main entrance with carved stone details, interior visible showing central nave with side chapels, altar area with devotional artwork, baptismal font, confessionals along walls, colorful frescoes depicting saints, wooden pews for worshippers, small piazza in front for community gatherings, modest yet beautiful stained glass, distinctly Venetian architectural elements including Byzantine influences, historically accurate but slightly stylized for game aesthetic, isometric game perspective, warm stone colors, sense of spiritual center with neighborhood identity, parishioners entering for services, priest greeting community members, subtle religious symbols integrated throughout architecture

upgradePath: Expanded Parish Church with additional chapels and services

soundDesign.ambientSound: Church bells at regular intervals, quiet prayers, echoing spaces
soundDesign.activitySounds: Choir practice, Mass ceremonies, community gatherings

seasonalEffects.ordinary time: Regular rhythm of daily Masses and prayers
